prompt: Examine Calendar.app events for TOMORROW between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM. Find all 1-hour time slots that are completely free (no overlapping events). Write each free slot on its own line in format 'HH:MM-HH:MM' (24-hour, no AM/PM) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/209-slots.txt. Example line: '11:00-12:00'. The file must contain at least one valid slot.
